---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, flag, or workflow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do today that ccprophet doesn't yet help with? A concrete user story is more useful than an abstract capability.

## Proposed CLI shape (optional)

```bash
# How would the feature look from the command line?
ccprophet ...
```

## Alternatives considered

- Workaround A — …
- Workaround B — …

## Phase / timing

- Is this urgent for your workflow, or "nice to have in the next minor"?
- Is this already on the Phase 2 roadmap (see `docs/PRD.md` §9)?
